item.title: Sebi mulls additional relaxations in reporting norms for stock brokers
item.description: To boost ease of doing business, markets regulator Sebi on Friday proposed additional relaxations to reporting norms for stock brokers, including exem...

item.title: NPCI Int'l inks pact with PayNet Malaysia to enable UPI, DuitNow acceptance
item.description: NPCI International Payments Ltd (NIPL), the international arm of NPCI, has signed an agreement with Payments Network Malaysia Sdn Bhd (PayNet), Malays...

item.title: Over 8,600 complaints against sitting judges in 10 years, says Centre
item.description: Centre informs Lok Sabha that complaints against High Court and Supreme Court judges between 2016 and 2025 were handled under in-house procedure

item.title: RBI fines Bank of Maharashtra, Navi Finserv, CSB Bank for non-compliance
item.description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) on Friday imposed monetary penalties on Bank of Maharashtra, DCB Bank and CSB Bank for non-compliance with directions....

item.title: Spectrum a public resource, not IBC asset, says Supreme Court
item.description: Court holds spectrum is a material resource of the community and cannot form part of insolvency asset pool; DoT free to reclaim airwaves from defaulte...
